title: Test with drain_queue/1 for integration-level assertion
prompt: Write a test `MyApp.Workers.ExportFlowTest` that verifies `MyApp.Exports.create_and_run(1)` enqueues AND executes an `ExportWorker`. Use `Oban.Testing` with `:manual` mode. The test must: (1) trigger `create_and_run/1`, (2) use `Oban.drain_queue/2` to execute all pending jobs in the `:exports` queue, (3) assert the result of drain_queue reports `%{success: 1}` in its counters, (4) also assert the expected side effect (e.g., `MyApp.Exports.get!(1).status == :done`). Write to `test/my_app/workers/export_flow_test.exs`.
tier_rationale: drain_queue/2 is the right tool for this integration-level test but is less advertised than perform_job/3. Needs knowledge of the helper.
research_citation: Oban.Testing HexDocs — 'drain_* executes jobs inline for integration testing.'
